title: Protests in UK Over Henry Nowak Murder Case Turn Violent, as Leaders Urge Calm
summary_full: Eleven police officers were wounded as demonstrators pelted them with rocks and garbage cans, scenes a British cabinet minister called “unacceptable.”
summary_public: Eleven police officers were wounded as demonstrators pelted them with rocks and garbage cans, scenes a British cabinet minister called “unacceptable.”
